bug_report.summary: View > Page Style submenu loses the built-in “Basic Page Style” option when a titled stylesheet is present
steps_to_reproduce: Load the provided data: URL that injects an alternate stylesheet with title “LateStyle”.
Open menu bar (Alt) > View > Page Style submenu.
expected_behaviors: Page Style submenu should always include built-in entries such as “Basic Page Style” and “No Style”.
If a titled stylesheet exists, it should be listed in addition to the built-in options (not replacing them).
actual_behaviors: “Basic Page Style” entry is missing; submenu shows only “No Style” and “LateStyle”.
